title: Rudgea lanceolata
taxonomy: Rudgea lanceolata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to tropical regions of the world, specifically in Southeast Asia. The classification of Rudgea lanceolata is typically done within the order Gentianales, a group of flowering plants known for their complex reproductive structures. The plant is further classified into the genus Rudgea and then the species lanceolata, making it a specific and unique member of the Rubiaceae family. By breaking down its classification, we can gain a better understanding of the plant's evolutionary history and its place within the broader plant kingdom.
